chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 369 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1015/2015 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 08-10-2020 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Baloch, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Shahabuddin A. Shaikh, Advocate, files power on behalf of Respondent No.3 (Regional Director, Sindh Small Industries Corporation, Sukkur), which is taken on record. Heard arguments at length. Learned counsel for the Petitioners submits that the Petitioners would be satisfied and will not press the instant petition, if the competent authority of Sindh Small Industries Corporation is directed to hear the Petitioners and pass a fresh order in accordance with law. Learned counsel for Respondent No.4 as well as learned AAG Sindh raised no objection for the above proposal. In view of the above, the instant petition along with listed application is disposed of with directions to competent authority of Sindh Small Industries Corporation to hear the Petitioners and pass a fresh order in accordance with law within thirty days under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. Office is directed to provide a copy of this order to learned counsel for Sindh Small Industries Corporation as well as learned AAG Sindh for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
